title: OntologyLookupInput
description: Input contract for the ontology-term-lookup orchestration: map a cell type from an atlas report to the Cell Ontology (CL).

report_path.description: Path to the cell type report markdown file to read the working definition from.

cell_type_label.description: The cell type annotation label to map to CL.

output_path.description: Path to write the cl_mapping.json result (validated against cl_mapping.schema.json).
